falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates a blowoff top formation, contradicting the current HOLD signal and pattern similarity to a historical bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity drops below 60% to bottom_2022_may_luna
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breaks the foundational pattern match required for the current verdict, invalidating the UNKNOWN/HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: Federal Reserve announces 50+ basis point rate cut within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Major central bank intervention would create a falsifiable market shift incompatible with the current HOLD signal

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
